description: Download new commits from a remote without changing any of your local branches
intents: see if there are new commits on the remote without merging
check what teammates pushed without changing my code
see what teammates pushed without changing anything locally
preview new upstream commits before deciding whether to pull
update my view of the remote without merging or rebasing
download new branches and refs but keep my working copy alone
look at upstream without touching my local branch
refresh remote tracking branches without altering my files
